ksa_text: Skill in communicating AI risk findings to technical and non-technical audiences, translating statistical risk measures into business impact terms.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-S-001 (RM, Skill) maps to Survey Researcher scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5262 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.526, eu_ai_act=0.464, ddat=0.437. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5262 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA RM-S-001 (RM, composite 0.5262) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.5262 with signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.526, eu_ai_act=0.464, ddat=0.437 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from RM-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5262, domain RM, scope weak fit. High confidence.
